ご、ごめんね、司令官くん。急に呼び出しちゃって。<br>どうしても伝えたいことが:
I'm sorry for calling you out so suddenly, Commander. There's
something I really need to tell you.
マジ卍で、ガチ恋！ アゲアゲで、ギガントかわちい！ <br>ぶっちゃけチョベリグ:
For real, I'm totally crushing on you! I'm pumped! You're mega cute!
Honestly, it's super good—we're more than friends—I feel a trendy destiny!
……えっ、もしかして、今の全部……意味わかってないの！？ <br>わたし、すっ:
Huh? Wait, you didn't understand any of that, did you? I tried so hard
to learn all that youth slang, and still...!
は、恥ずかしい……っ！ <br>司令官くん、お願いだから……今の言葉は忘れてちょ:
H-how embarrassing...! Commander, please... forget everything I just
said...!
